text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Is that... Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(She's so powerful and independent.<n>I bet no one
makes fun of her.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(To think, even someone as talented<n>as her stays
so late to train...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Trainer, think up some extra training<n>for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I need to keep practicing if I'm<n>ever gonna
catch up to the top racers.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to be some coward<n>who's always
chasing after<n>everyone.
choice_data_list: You should work at your own pace.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I warn her not to overdo it but agree<n>to add more
to her regimen.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(One day, I'm going to be just like<n>her. No, that's
not enough—I'll beat<n>her!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh... Is that Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmm, that's some nice running<n>she's doing.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is totally fired up and<n>keeps at her
extra training until it's<n>almost curfew.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, then I'll change my<n>pace to
match Brian's!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I won't get stronger if I don't work at<n>the same
pace as someone who's<n>better than me!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You two! Fighting's prohibi—oh,<n>Taishin. What
happened here?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And there's Brian. I know exactly<n>what she'd say
if she heard you,<n>Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Crush everyone by running the way<n>you want
instead of forcing yourself<n>to run like someone
else. It feels<n>better, and you can get stronger too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Personally, I would also suggest you<n>run at your
own pace.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Grr!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin doesn't seem fully<n>convinced, but
she nods bitterly and<n>takes a break.
